## financial_event_raw

- Phase: `P1`
- Primary key: `api_name, ts_code, record_key`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| api_name | VARCHAR | no |  | api_name | Tushare API name |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no |  | ts_code | Stock code |
| record_key | VARCHAR | no |  | record_key | Stable hash key of raw event row |
| ann_date | DATE | yes |  | ann_date | Announcement date when available |
| end_date | DATE | yes |  | end_date | Report period when available |
| event_date | DATE | yes |  | event_date | Event date when available |
| payload_json | JSON | no |  | payload_json | Full raw Tushare row payload |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no |  | updated_at | Local update timestamp |

## derived_daily_spine

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | Stock code |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | Trade date |
| is_trade | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | is_trade | Whether stock has daily quote on trade date |
| is_listed_asof | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | is_listed_asof | Whether stock is listed as of trade date |
| list_status_asof | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | list_status_asof | Listing status as of trade date |
| days_since_list | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_list | Calendar days since list date |
| market | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | market | Market board |
| exchange | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | exchange | Exchange |

| high_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | high_raw | Raw high price |
| low_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | low_raw | Raw low price |
| close_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_raw | Raw close price |
| pre_close_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pre_close_raw | Raw previous close price |
| change_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | change_raw | Raw price change |
| pct_chg_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pct_chg_raw | Raw percentage change |
| volume | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | volume | Trading volume |
| amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | amount | Trading amount |
| amplitude_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | amplitude_raw | Raw amplitude |

| latest_adj_factor_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_adj_factor_asof | Latest adjustment factor in current database |

| low_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | low_hfq | Backward-adjusted low price |

| pre_close_qfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pre_close_qfq | Current-scale forward-adjusted previous close price |

| ret_1_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_1_hfq | One-day backward-adjusted simple return |
| log_ret_1 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_ret_1 | Legacy alias of one-day backward-adjusted log return |
| log_ret_1_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_ret_1_hfq | One-day backward-adjusted log return |
| overnight_ret_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | overnight_ret_hfq | Backward-adjusted overnight return |
| intraday_ret_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | intraday_ret_hfq | Backward-adjusted intraday return |

| gap_open_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | gap_open_hfq | Backward-adjusted open gap |
| close_position_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_position_hfq | Close position in backward-adjusted daily range |
| up_limit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | up_limit | Raw upper limit price |
| down_limit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | down_limit | Raw lower limit price |
| limit_up_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | limit_up_flag | Whether close reaches daily upper limit |
| limit_down_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | limit_down_flag | Whether close reaches daily lower limit |
| touch_limit_up_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | touch_limit_up_flag | Whether high reaches daily upper limit |
| touch_limit_down_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | touch_limit_down_flag | Whether low reaches daily lower limit |
| open_limit_up_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | open_limit_up_flag | Whether open reaches daily upper limit |
| open_limit_down_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | open_limit_down_flag | Whether open reaches daily lower limit |
| limit_up_gap | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | limit_up_gap | Raw close distance to upper limit |
| limit_down_gap | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | limit_down_gap | Raw close distance to lower limit |
| has_price | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_price | Whether OHLC price is available |
| has_adj_factor | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_adj_factor | Whether adjustment factor is available |
| has_limit_price | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_limit_price | Whether limit prices are available |
| price_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | price_valid_flag | Whether OHLC price relation is valid |
| missing_reason | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | missing_reason | Initial missing data reason |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no |  | updated_at | Local update timestamp |
